# MC Studio — Professional Photography Studio

## About
MC Studio is a premium photography studio based in Israel offering professional photography services nationwide. We specialize in Events, portraits, and commercial photography with a zero-compromise approach to quality.

## Services
- Event Photography: Full-day coverage, engagement sessions, 500+ edited photos, online gallery, premium album design
- Portrait Photography: Family, pregnancy, headshots, styled sessions, 30+ retouched images, print-ready files
- Commercial Photography: Product photography, brand visuals, e-commerce images, team headshots, social media content

## Coverage Area
All of Israel — from Eilat to Metula. We travel to any location for your event or session.

## Differentiators
- Zero compromises: We reshoot if needed until every image is perfect
- Unlimited editing revisions until full client satisfaction
- Nationwide coverage across Israel
- Boutique-level personal service — every project gets full creative attention
- Versatile expertise across all photography types

## Pricing
Custom packages tailored to each project. Event packages start from approximately NIS 8,000. Portrait sessions start from approximately NIS 1,500. Contact for a free consultation and detailed quote within 24 hours.

## Client Testimonials
- "We cried when we saw our photos — every single moment was captured beautifully." — Sarah & Daniel, Event, Tel Aviv
- "We finally have a photo that truly reflects who we are as a family." — The Cohen Family, Family Portrait, Jerusalem
- "Our product photos increased our online sales by 40%. The quality speaks for itself." — Maya L., Product Photography, Haifa
- "The photographer turned every small moment into a huge memory — can't recommend enough." — Noa & Itai, Event, Jerusalem
- "I've never felt so beautiful. The pregnancy photos are something I'll treasure forever." — Yael S., Pregnancy Portrait, Herzliya

Hebrew, English
